{
  "claims": [
    "In January 2019, there were 312 veterans experiencing homelessness in Orange County.",
    "Supportive housing units for 124 veterans are under construction in Placentia and Santa Ana.",
    "The funding administered to Welcome Home OC is enough to provide apartments for the remaining 188 homeless veterans currently on the streets.",
    "Welcome Home OC streamlines the process for apartment owners and significantly shortens the time for placing homeless individuals into housing.",
    "Welcome Home OC provides for case management and supportive care to keep homeless veterans in housing long term.",
